chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-6097 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 24.09.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up on 15.12.2023, which is almost two years ago. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, despite the lapse of two years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
